The '''Ministry Council''' was the collective governmental decision-making body that bought together the principal [[Minister/Legends|ministers]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. The Ministry Council was a [[Senate Council]] of the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] charged with funding the [[New Republic General Ministry]], approving the [[First Administrator]], and general oversight of the various ministries.

If the [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] should die, be incapacitated, or generally out of contact, the Ministry Council had the right to select an interim Chief of State from the current Minister of State, a former Minister, or a former Chief of State, at least until the Senate could elect a new Chief of State—a very special power when compared to even the [[New Republic Ruling Council|Ruling Council]]. During the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], [[Doman Beruss (Illodian)|Doman Beruss]] served as Chair of the Ministry Council.
